stemHtml: A pilot is departing from Lille, in F-GTPO, where runways 26 and 20 are in use. The pilot receives the following message: F-PO, behind the landing Airbus, line up and wait runway 26 behind.Which one of the following is correct?

options.a: The message was preceded by: "F-PO, report the Airbus on final in sight" and the pilot’s reply "F-PO, Airbus in sight". Following the message, the pilot’s read back is: "Behind the Airbus, line up and wait runway 26 behind, F-PO".
options.b: The message was preceded by: "F-PO, ready for immediate departure". Following the message, the pilot’s read back is: "Behind the Airbus, line up and wait runway 26 behind, F-PO".
options.c: The message was preceded by: "F-PO, report the Airbus on final in sight" and the pilot’s reply "F-PO, Airbus in sight". Following the message, the pilot’s read back is: "Behind the Airbus, line up and wait, F-PO".
options.d: The pilot’s read back is: "Behind the Airbus, line up and wait, F-PO".
